# kCFSOCKSNegotiationMethodKey | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ CFNetwork ](/documentation/cfnetwork)

- [ kCFSOCKSNegotiationMethodKey ](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksnegotiationmethodkey)

-  kCFSOCKSNegotiationMethodKey 

Global Variable# kCFSOCKSNegotiationMethodKey

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
let kCFSOCKSNegotiationMethodKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/cfnetwork/kcfsocksnegotiationmethodkey#Discussion)

If an error of type `kCFSOCKS5ErrorUnsupportedNegotiationMethod` is returned, querying this key returns the negotiation method requested by the SOCKS server.
